message:
fix(io): preserve trailing newline when writing files

When writing corrected content to files, the code used join("\n") which
doesn't add a trailing newline. This caused files to lose their final
newline character, violating the Unix text file convention.

Fixed by adding a trailing newline after join("\n") in all file write
locations:
- watch mode file writes
- single file in-place writes
- recursive mode file writes

Note: stdout output was already correct (using writeln!).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
